chromium_base.reproducibility_note: The selected ref and commit are recorded. A release-grade source acquisition must fetch this ref and record the Chromium DEPS file hash plus gclient sync metadata before building.

local_dogfood_binary.reason: Existing local Chrome can exercise BrowseForge Chromium-family launch wiring, but it is not the selected Chromium base, not patched, and not a BrowseForge runtime release artifact.

decision: Proceed with local dogfood against the configured external Chrome binary only; keep release gates blocked until selected Chromium source, DEPS snapshot, and a real patched artifact exist.
